step: Full pipeline loopback verification and bug-fix pass

SingleCallFullPipeline.notes: All 8 services alive incl. generic TTS dock; 30s stability monitor

NeuTTSCodecShapeRegressionSynthesisSucce.notes: 3 synthesis calls to NeuTTS via EngineClient — WAV_RESULT returned (RTF 0.32-0.42)

SwitchEngineMidCall.notes: Dock reported ACTIVE kokoro, then neutts connected and swap completed; kokoro received SHUTDOWN and exited; SIP/LLaMA/TTS/OAP remained alive

KillAndRestartEngine.notes: SIGKILL kokoro -> dock cleared to NONE within 15s; restarted kokoro re-docked successfully; no other services restarted

bugs_fixed.title: Self-join deadlock in engine SHUTDOWN handler
bugs_fixed.symptom: libc++abi: terminating due to uncaught exception of type std::__1::system_error: thread::join failed: Resource deadlock avoided
bugs_fixed.root_cause: CUSTOM SHUTDOWN dispatch runs on EngineClient::run_loop thread; calling this->shutdown() -> engine_.shutdown() attempted to join that same thread.
bugs_fixed.fix: Replace this->shutdown() with shutdown_all_calls() + std::_Exit(0); rely on the OS to reap the engine process during swap.

bugs_fixed.title: Integration tests used too-short polling timeouts for Kokoro first-boot
bugs_fixed.symptom: SwitchEngineMidCall/KillAndRestartEngine asserted ACTIVE kokoro within 10-120s, but Kokoro CoreML ANE compilation on a cold cache takes 5-6 minutes.
bugs_fixed.fix: Poll the dock STATUS cmd-port for up to 600s (10 minutes) before asserting the expected ACTIVE kokoro state.

notes.cold_boot_observation: Kokoro first-time ANE compilation takes ~5-6 minutes for 3 decoder variants + 3 F0/N predictor variants; warm cache boot is ~25s.
notes.loopback_topology: SIP <-> IAP <-> VAD <-> Whisper <-> LLaMA <-> TTS(dock) <-> Kokoro/NeuTTS engine (hot-plug) <-> OAP <-> SIP
